case_title: KRIEBEL, STEPHANIE VS T.N.J.A.,INC.DBA T&R 76 PRO SERVICE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY KRIEBEL, STEPHANIE AS TO DEFENDANT T.N.J.A.,INC.DBA T&R 76 PRO SERVICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-16-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT T.N.J.A.,INC.DBA T&R 76 PRO SERVICE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KRIEBEL, STEPHANIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT T.N.J.A.,INC.DBA T&R 76 PRO SERVICE $700.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $750.00, DEFENDANT IS TO RELEASE PLAINTIFF'S CAR TO PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT OWE STORAGE CHARGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SUBPENA DOCUMENTS ON KEEPER OF RECORDS, DEPT OF CONSUMER AFFAIRS SET FOR JULY 16, 2002 @ 10AM RECEIVED AND FILED.
